zh.Davenham, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾達文哈姆
zh.Davenham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾達文哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hilton II於1550年2月8日出生在英國英格蘭爾達文哈姆時，他的父親William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich45歲，母親Elisabeth36歲。他於從0084年到1582年與unknown在英國英格蘭爾達文哈姆聖 維爾福利達斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1604年住在英國英格蘭爾諾維其且於1605年住在英國爾。他去世於1605年2月14日在英國英格蘭爾維頓享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾維頓。

zh-hans.Davenham, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾達文哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hilton II于1550年2月8日出生在英国英格兰爾達文哈姆时，他的父亲William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich45岁，母亲Elisabeth36岁。他于从0084年到1582年与unknown在英国英格兰爾達文哈姆聖 維爾福利達斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1604年住在英国英格兰爾諾維其且于1605年住在英国爾。他去世于1605年2月14日在英国英格兰爾維頓享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾維頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

variants.name: Hulton
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilt
meanings: German: from a short form of Hildebrand or some other compound ancient Germanic name formed with hild ‘strife, battle’ as the first element. See Hild .
English (London): from the Middle English personal name Hilte, ultimately from ancient Germanic Helto, probably from halith- ‘hero’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Hilton II was born on 8 February 1550, in Davenham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich, was 45 and his mother, Elisabeth, was 36. He married unknown from 0084 to 1582, in St Wilfrid's Church, Davenham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1604 and Cheshire, England in 1605. He died on 14 February 1605, in Witton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Witton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hilton II est né le 8 février 1550, à Davenham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé unknown du 0084 au 1582, à St Wilfrid's Church, Davenham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1604 et à Cheshire, Angleterre en 1605. Il est décédé le 14 février 1605, à Witton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Witton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hilton II am 8. Februar 1550 in Davenham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich 45 und seine Mutter Elisabeth 36. Er hat von 0084 bis 1582 in St Wilfrid's Church, Davenham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1604 hat er in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und 1605 in Cheshire, England gelebt. Er starb am 14. Februar 1605 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Witton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Witton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hilton II è nato il il 8 febbraio 1550 nel Davenham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato unknown da 0084 a 1582, nel St Wilfrid's Church, Davenham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Northwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1604 e nel Cheshire, England nel 1605. Morì il 14 febbraio 1605, nel Witton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Witton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hilton IIが1550年2月8日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダベンハムで生まれた時，父William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwichは45歳，母Elisabethは36歳であった。から0084年まで1582年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダベンハムスト ウィルフリド'ス チャーチでunknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1604年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチに，1605年にはイギリスチェシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1605年2月14日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウィットオンで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウィットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hilton II(이)가 1550년 2월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 대븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth(은)는 36세였다. 그는 0084년 부터 1582년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 대븐함 스트 윌프리드'스 c후르치에서 unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1604년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르스위치에서, 1605년도에 영국 체실르에서 살았다. 그는 1605년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윗튼에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윗튼에 묻혔다.

pt.8 February 1550–14 February 1605: 8 de fevereiro de 1550–14 de fevereiro de 1605
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hilton II nasceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1550, em Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com unknown de 0084 a 1582, em St Wilfrid's Church, Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1604 e em Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1605. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1605, em Witton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Witton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hilton II родился 8 февраля 1550 г. в местности давенам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени unknown с 0084 по 1582 в местности ст уилфрид'с чурч, давенам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1604 году и в местности чешир, Англия в 1605 году. Он умер 14 февраля 1605 г. в местности виттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности виттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.8 February 1550–14 February 1605: 8 de febrero de 1550–14 de febrero de 1605
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hilton II nació el 8 de febrero de 1550, en Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Hilton I Of Shipbrook by Witton Chapelry, Northwich, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elisabeth, tenía 36 años. Se casó con unknown desde 0084 hasta 1582, en St Wilfrid's Church, Davenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1604 y en Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1605. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1605, en Witton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Witton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
